svg.title: Stock market data pipeline architecture
svg.desc: Two parallel pipelines — batch on the left, streaming on the right — both sourcing data from AlphaVantage through Kafka, consumers, MinIO storage, and Spark processing. The batch pipeline ends in Snowflake and is orchestrated by Airflow.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the AlphaVantage API integrate with both the batch and stream producers in this project?')
sendPrompt('How does the batch producer call TIME_SERIES_DAILY and what does it publish to Kafka?')
sendPrompt('How does the stream producer call GLOBAL_QUOTE and what does it publish to Kafka?')
sendPrompt('What is the shape of messages on the stock-market-batch Kafka topic?')
sendPrompt('What is the shape of messages on the stock-market-realtime Kafka topic?')
sendPrompt('How does the batch consumer read from Kafka, write to MinIO, and know when to exit?')
sendPrompt('How does the realtime consumer buffer messages and flush them to MinIO?')
sendPrompt('What CSV files are stored in MinIO under raw/historical and what is their partition path?')
sendPrompt('What CSV files are stored in MinIO under raw/realtime and how are they partitioned?')
sendPrompt('What daily metrics does the Spark batch processor compute and how does it write Parquet?')
sendPrompt('What sliding window metrics does the Spark stream processor compute?')
sendPrompt('What Parquet files are stored in MinIO processed/historical and what columns do they contain?')
sendPrompt('What Parquet files are stored in MinIO processed/realtime?')
sendPrompt('How does load_to_snowflake.py upsert data into the DAILY_STOCK_METRICS table using MERGE?')
